summary: Frontend-only testing for Hönsgården app. Verified critical bug fixes: 1) App no longer stuck on loading screen (Metro bundler ESM fix working), 2) Welcome screen loads correctly with all features displayed, 3) Navigation between auth screens works properly, 4) Forgot Password flow navigates correctly to email input form, 5) Registration form shows all required fields and GDPR consent checkboxes, 6) Login error handling shows visible error message. All tested features are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ metro.config.js: config.resolver.unstable_enablePackageExports = false - prevents zustand ESM import.meta issues
✅ _layout.tsx: Simplified initialization logic with proper async/await and state management
✅ login.tsx: AuthMode state machine handles welcome/login/register/forgot/verify-code/new-password/register-verify states
✅ Login error handling: Shows inline error message 'Felaktig e-post eller lösenord' with styled error box
✅ Forgot Password flow: handleForgotPassword() calls API and navigates to verify-code step via Alert.alert callback
✅ Registration form: Has name, email, password fields with GDPR checkboxes for terms acceptance and marketing consent
test_credentials: No credentials needed for UI navigation testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend authentication flows verified working. Loading screen bug is fixed (metro.config.js change). All auth navigation (welcome -> login -> forgot password -> verify code and welcome -> registration) works correctly. Login error handling displays visible inline error message. App is in Swedish.

Welcome Screen Loads.details: App loads Hönsgården branding, 'Välkommen!' heading, feature grid (Äggdagbok, Hönsprofiler, Statistik, Ekonomi), 'Kom igång gratis' button, 'Logga in' link

Login Screen Navigation.details: Clicking 'Logga in' navigates to login form with email, password fields, 'Glömt lösenord?' link

Forgot Password Flow.details: Clicking 'Glömt lösenord?' shows email input form with 'Skicka kod' button, back navigation to login

Registration Flow.details: 'Skapa konto' form shows Name, Email, Password fields with required indicators, GDPR checkboxes present

GDPR Consent Checkboxes.details: Two checkboxes: 1) Terms acceptance (required), 2) Marketing consent (optional)

Login Error Handling.details: Wrong credentials trigger visible inline error: 'Felaktig e-post eller lösenord' in styled red error box

screenshots_captured: login_form.png - Login form with all fields
login_error_final.png - Error message visible after wrong credentials
